heroHeadline: US Tariffs Hit 145% on China; DeepSeek V4 Imminent on Huawei Ascend — Tech War Reaches Inflection
heroSubtitle: US-China tariff escalation reaches historic 145%/125% level; DeepSeek V4 launch on Huawei chips expected late April; China's space computing constellation, AI robotics, and domestic chip ecosystem accelerating under pressure
footerNote: Data sourced from MIIT, BIS, Bloomberg, FT, SCMP, CSET, Nikkei Asia, TechInsights, DeepSeek, Huawei Annual Reports, TrendForce, US Trade Representative
